prompt: An aisle between two tall dark mahogany bookshelves in a grand old library. The shelves are packed with leather-bound books with gold-lettered spines. A wooden rolling ladder leans against the left shelf. At the far end of the aisle, a reading desk with a green banker's lamp emits warm light. The overall lighting is dim and warm, creating a scholarly, intimate atmosphere. Above the tops of the bookshelves, ornate brass chandeliers with frosted glass shades hang from a richly coffered ceiling with dark wood panels and gilded trim. A second-story gallery balcony with a carved wooden balustrade runs along the upper walls. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level, standing in the narrow aisle between the tall bookshelves and looking forward along the corridor.

A wooden rolling ladder leans against the left shelf. At the far end of the aisle, a reading desk with a green banker's lamp emits warm light. The overall lighting is dim and warm, creating a scholarly, intimate atmosphere.
